SaintQuant No-Code AI Crypto Trading Bots

No-code AI crypto trading bots designed for automated 24/7 crypto trading, particularly catering to beginners and passive investors with integrated risk management.

Category Finance
Pricing $0/mo Free, $29/mo Starter, $99/mo Pro, $199/mo Enterprise
Released June 20, 2026
Visit SaintQuant No-Code AI Crypto Trading Bots →

About SaintQuant No-Code AI Crypto Trading Bots

As of June 2026, SaintQuant offers no-code AI crypto trading bots designed for automated 24/7 crypto trading, particularly catering to beginners and passive investors. The platform provides pre-built, AI-driven quantitative strategies that users can activate with a single click, removing the need for coding or manual configuration. SaintQuant's AI bots continuously monitor crypto, stock, and futures markets and execute trades around the clock without requiring user intervention once activated. It is specifically built for users with no prior trading experience, offering a simplified setup process and automated decision-making. SaintQuant is suitable for passive investors who want crypto exposure without daily trade management, allowing portfolios to work without constant monitoring. The platform utilizes machine learning and deep learning models to process millions of data signals daily, selecting from proven quantitative approaches like Dollar-Cost Averaging (DCA), Grid trading, and Swing strategies. Built-in risk management features including automated stop-losses, real-time exposure monitoring, and dynamic risk controls are integrated into every strategy to protect positions during volatile market conditions. New users can receive a $99 free trial credit (for a 10-day Starter plan) and a $7 instant cash bonus upon registration, allowing them to experience live AI trading without an initial deposit. SaintQuant integrates with major cryptocurrency exchanges such as Binance, Bybit, Coinbase, Kraken, OKX, KuCoin, Bitget, and BingX.

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • No-code AI crypto trading bots - activate with single click
  • 24/7 automated trading without user intervention once activated
  • Specifically designed for beginners and passive investors
  • Utilizes machine learning and deep learning models for trading strategies
  • Built-in risk management with automated stop-losses and dynamic controls
  • Free trial credit ($99 for 10-day Starter plan) and $7 instant cash bonus
  • Integrates with major cryptocurrency exchanges (Binance, Bybit, Coinbase, etc.)
  • Eliminates need for coding or extensive trading knowledge
  • Suitable for passive investors wanting crypto exposure without daily management
  • Scales to serve individual investors to large institutional investors

❌ Cons

  • May have limitations with highly volatile or unpredictable cryptocurrency markets
  • Dependent on quality and completeness of underlying data signals
  • May not cover all cryptocurrency exchanges or trading pairs
  • Requires ongoing maintenance and updates to keep pace with cryptocurrency market changes
  • May need configuration for specific trading strategies and risk preferences
  • Potential over-reliance on AI reducing traditional trading skills and knowledge
  • Requires internet connection for access to AI-powered trading bots
  • Performance may vary with market conditions and data availability
  • May face regulatory scrutiny in certain jurisdictions regarding automated trading
  • Requires user trust in AI-driven trading decisions and risk management

Best For

Beginners and passive investors seeking accessible automated cryptocurrency trading solutions, particularly useful for those who want crypto exposure without daily trade management, coding requirements, or extensive trading knowledge.
